paper_title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

extraction_data.innovation: Introduces a bidirectional masked language model (MLM) combined with a next‑sentence prediction (NSP) objective, enabling deep bidirectional Transformers for language understanding.
extraction_data.extension: The MLM objective lets each token attend to both left and right context, overcoming the unidirectional limitation of prior language models.
extraction_data.research_problem: Improving language understanding via unsupervised pre‑training of deep bidirectional Transformers.
extraction_data.application: Fine‑tuning on downstream NLP tasks such as GLUE benchmark, question answering, and text classification.
extraction_data.paper_title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
